title: MyVillager
description: A plugin allowing players to claim villagers as their owns
body:
# MyVillager
This is a simple plugin allowing the players to claim villagers as their own.  
After claiming the villager, other players are not able to trade with it.  
The owners can also modify permission group letting their friends to use the villager(s).  
Other players are not permmited to damage the claimed villager.  
Economy function supported (Optional, requires Vault)  

![anvil](https://s2.loli.net/2026/01/06/1QdhxTSkEArKus5.gif)
![lightning](https://s2.loli.net/2026/01/17/fjnS5kW8TEVD9my.gif)
![lava](https://s2.loli.net/2026/01/06/6iN2O3eU4rqaBno.png)
![v1](https://s2.loli.net/2025/04/19/sYcXA5EjqPSrug2.png)

See guide on [PixelCraft Documentation](https://docs.p1mc.top/MyVillager/intro.html)

![bstats](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/myvillager.svg)
